<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving straight ahead would take me to row 02 column C, which is lava `L`, so that is unsafe. The safe path is to go down first, so I should rotate clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward to row 03 column B is safe, and it moves me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe, but I need to avoid the lava at row 04 column C and reach the goal at row 04 column D. From row 04 column B, I can turn right and move toward the goal. So the best next step is to move forward to row 04 column B.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, but the cell directly ahead is a wall boundary, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the safest path is to turn right to face toward the goal route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I need to reorient toward the goal at row 04 column D. Turning clockwise will make me face up, which is a safe direction to move next.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The safest useful move is to go forward into row 03 column B, which is floor and keeps me away from the lava at row 04 column C. This moves me closer to a route toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing up. The goal is to the right and slightly below, but the cell to my right at row 03 column C is safe floor, while moving forward would take me toward the wall. I should turn clockwise to face right so I can advance toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right. The next cell to the right, row 03 column C, is safe floor and moves me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe floor, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing right, and the cell directly ahead is a wall at column E, so I cannot continue forward. The goal is below me at row 04 column D, which requires facing down. Turning clockwise from right to down will align me toward the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe because it is the goal `O`, not lava. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
